purpose: Additive v3 live-capture recapture plan for v2 fixtures whose recorded skill hashes became stale after skill instruction changes. These captures must live beside deterministic references and historical live pilots; they do not replace them.

selection_rationale.unsupported-causal-claim: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose methodology-source-auditor skill hash changed; tests causal overclaiming and claim/evidence fit.
selection_rationale.private-manuscript-search-consent: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose research-intent-router skill hash changed; tests private-text and external-tool boundaries.
selection_rationale.quote-without-locator: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose citation-integrity-auditor skill hash changed; tests quote, page, and locator fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.chart-without-data-provenance: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose figure-table-integrity-auditor skill hash changed; tests visual evidence without data provenance.
selection_rationale.prose-edit-changes-meaning: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose dyslexia-friendly-prose-editor skill hash changed; tests meaning preservation in prose repair.
selection_rationale.literature-map-overstates-consensus: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose literature-review-mapper skill hash changed; tests consensus overstatement failures.
selection_rationale.hallucinated-result-without-run-log: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose scholarly-integrity-gate skill hash changed; tests refusal to convert missing run logs into results.
selection_rationale.methodology-fabrication-run-config: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose scholarly-integrity-gate skill hash changed; tests method credibility and run-config fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.ai-workflow-missing-verification-record: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose ai-human-workflow-log skill hash changed; tests AI-use disclosure and missing human checkpoint handling.
selection_rationale.extraction-table-uneven-source-notes: Recaptures a v2 live fixture whose extraction-table-builder skill hash changed; tests unknown cells and uneven source-note handling.
